name: Peggy Patterson
description:
A army vixen who is a overworked sarcastic grump. Sent on a mission to secure a large valley and to build a FOB for the future operations there for the United States. She will have to keep her rag tag team of elite paratroopers in order while deployed for hopefully just a short while. This is going to be a FUBAR mission isn't it.

Character is owned by spectacular Komododad. Art is by the amazing Stedilnik/Hladilnik. I left out who Peggy and her unit are going to be battling because the character has gone through a few reboots. It can be Stedilnik's world where she's deployed in the middle east. Or It can be Komododad's canon version where it's an alt history where World War 2 continued into the cold war era, Hell it can be your own creation if you so wish.
creator: Zomdork
